programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Poison Mastermind

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A Navy vet and a military mom tackle the harsh conditions of Mexico's uninhabitable Cayo Venado. A prowling black panther, tree sap poisonous to the touch, and a week of freezing rain lead this pair of survivalists right up to the breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lord of the Rats
programme.desc: A workaholic mom and a loner are challenged to survive three weeks in Thailand. Competing with monkeys and rats for food, it's a daily struggle not only to survive, but to understand each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: All or Nothing
programme.desc: A hunter from Louisiana meets a California surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in and the duo spends most of their time securing a reliable water source to ensure their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hangry
programme.desc: Former Marine Tim and stonemason Shannon take on armies of stinging red ants and bubbling mud volcanoes on the Caribbean island of Trinidad. Even with this daunting location working against them, their biggest struggle is actually each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: A survival instructor and retiree of the armed forces are inserted into the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat. With completely different survival styles, they find a way to work together, but one accident single-handedly has an eruptive effect on both.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: In Too Deep
programme.desc: On the edge of the Bermuda Triangle, an Army veteran dive master and a Cajun boat captain take on relentless thunderstorms and battle dehydration as they try navigate more than 20 miles of open ocean in the ultimate test of sink or swim.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Duane Ollinger believes there's a fortune of gold buried beneath his property in Utah, Blind Frog Ranch. But even though the land seems to be fighting him at every turn, he's not going to stop until he gets his hands on the gold, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bahama Drama
programme.desc: In the Bahamas two fans face relentless insects and aggressive sharks during hurricane season.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: Instant attraction gives way to unforgiving conditions on a Nicaraguan island teeming with bull sharks and big cats. As the struggle to survive hits a low point; a brutal flood threatens to wipe out the camp and all chances of survival.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: What Lies Beneath

programme.desc: Georg is fishing Gulf wrecks being Codjoe Key.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Everglades Exploration
programme.desc: Fishing takes place at Everglades National Park.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: America's Lost WWII Hero
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Snake Kings
programme.desc: Josh Gates returns to Guatemala with a potential breakthrough in the search for a Snake King tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Ruby Slippers
programme.desc: Josh investigates the theft of the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in the 1939 classic movie, The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels the globe attempting to solve the most fundamental mystery of all: humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day? And what does that mean for our future?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Revealing Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to Africa to get up close and personal with a distant relative and scale dangerous cliffs all to answer where humans came from.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Secrets
programme.desc: Josh investigates how a group of Norse tribesman gained power in medieval Europe. His search begins in their one-time home base of Denmark and continues on to the first place they expanded off continent, the remote island of Iceland.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth
programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Strife of the Party/Kernel of Truth
programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny, Sid and Diego come to realize that the warm weather could spell trouble by melting a large glacial dam surrounding the valley. Along the way, Manny's fears of being the last woolly mammoth are diminished when he meets a female named Ellie.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: An Academic Crime and a More Romantic Taco Bell
programme.desc: Dr. Sturgis is furious when Sheldon accuses him of plagiarism. Mary sets out to find a 'girl trophy' for Missy’s end-of-season baseball ceremony, and Georgie has an awkward run-in with Veronica while on a date with his new girlfriend, Jana.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Couple Bruised Ribs and a Cereal Box Ghost Detector
programme.desc: When George Sr. accidentally lands the school librarian, Ms. Hutchins, in the hospital, the Cooper family must nurse her back to health.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A House for Sale and Serious Woman Stuff
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns the house next door is for sale, he takes it upon himself to find the perfect neighbors. Also, Missy is torn when she’s forced to pitch against her boyfriend at the baseball game.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Baby Tooth and the Egyptian God of Knowledge
programme.desc: Sheldon has a scientific breakthrough at the dentist’s office. Also, Dale and Meemaw go to the casino, and Georgie makes a big mistake when Dale leaves him in charge of the store.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad
programme.desc: The attractive widowed father of Ross's new girlfriend makes a big impression on Rachel.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Paul's the Man
programme.desc: The father of Ross's coed girlfriend threatens to have him fired for dating a student.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ring
programme.desc: Chandler takes a chance when he secretly asks Phoebe to help him choose a special ring.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Proposal

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Proposal

programme.title: Mom: A Bouncy Castle and An Aneurysm

programme.title: Mom: Roast Chicken and a Funny Story
programme.desc: When a heartbroken Bonnie drives everyone crazy, Christy begs Adam to take her back.

programme.title: Mom: Night Swimmin' and An English Muffin
programme.desc: When Bonnie discovers Adam is still close with his ex-wife, Christy worries the emotional fallout could jeopardize Bonnie's sobriety.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Full House: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: D.J.'s duties as editor of the school newspaper cause a rift in her friendship with Kim.

programme.title: Full House: A Pinch for a Pinch
programme.desc: Jesse gives Michelle some very questionable advice and takes her out of preschool.

programme.title: Full House: Viva Las Joey
programme.desc: Joey takes his comedy act to Las Vegas, where his estranged father shows up unannounced.

programme.title: Full House: Shape Up
programme.desc: D.J. goes on crash diet so that she can wear a bikini to Kimmy's 14th birthday party.

programme.title: Full House: One Last Kiss
programme.desc: Although he's engaged to Rebecca, Jesse is still attracted to his high school sweetheart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Land/ The Camping Episode
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs builds a children's theme park; Pat and SpongeBob camp in the backyard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Save Our Shores
programme.desc: A huge trash spill at the beach endangers the local wildlife; Scrozzle sets about finding reinforcements.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid Noir/ ScavengerPants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny, Sid and Diego come to realize that the warm weather could spell trouble by melting a large glacial dam surrounding the valley. Along the way, Manny's fears of being the last woolly mammoth are diminished when he meets a female named Ellie.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Paranoia/ Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous. SpongeBob introduces Patrick to the wonderful world of book learning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Place/ Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. SpongeBob spills a milkshake during a delivery.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Tornados and Killer Bees
programme.desc: What do you do when a tornado is about to strike? Could you survive an attack of killer bees? Incredible caught-on-tape moments challenge you with live power lines, dangerous sinkholes, enormous blizzards, massive landslides and vicious sunburns!

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Deadly Cold
programme.desc: Rulon Gardner won the Greco-Roman wrestling gold medal in the 2000 Olympics. Two years later, he got soaked when his snowmobile was stuck in a river. With temperatures plunging to 25 below zero, he faced his toughest opponent: death.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Family Emergency
programme.desc: During a day hike in the mountains outside of Wellington, New Zealand, Carolyn and her daughter, Rachel became lost on the descent. With the temperature dropping, Carolyn desperately tries to get her daughter shelter and warmth.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Desert Heat
programme.desc: Celebrating their anniversary Rick and Cathy hiked a trail in the Texas desert. They lost track of their location and became dehydrated quickly. Cathy becomes unable to move and Rick becomes their only hope to survive.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Trapped in a Blizzard
programme.desc: The Kim family take a wrong turn and find themselves stuck in snow on a logging road. With no knowledge about how survive the cold and mountains the Kim's get desperate. After 3 days they run out of food, gas and hopes of another car coming to save them.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: North Woods Trapper
programme.desc: Creek and three strangers brave northern Michigan temperatures and as their hunting plans fail, the starving group resorts to eating tree bark and a squirrel. Frustrations peak when the guys are abandoned for the last cold, rainy night.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Lumberjack 101
programme.desc: Creek and three football coaches build a log cabin lean-to shelter and face getting lost in Drummond Island's vast, frozen forest on their hunt for food. Too far from camp, a lucky find quickly turns into an emergency situation before night falls.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Bare Bones Survival
programme.desc: Creek and three guys use primitive skills to stay alive in Mendoza Canyon, Arizona’s harsh environment. They create a bare bones shelter made up of desert reed mats and use the backbreaking 'sotol fire saw' method.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Operation Desert Patrol
programme.desc: Creek and three guys consult a survival manual as they trek 30 miles through Arizona's Sonoran Desert. A week in a parachute-teepee with little water, disgusting desert grub and failed fire attempts prove to be both mentally and physically exhausting.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Man-Made Earthquakes
programme.desc: Scientists struggle to understand earthquakes, but new research has revealed that earthquakes can be triggered by not just from within the earth, but also by damns and reservoirs, mines and the oil drilling technique called fracking.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Death Traps: Quicksand, Whirlpools and Riptides
programme.desc: The interaction that land and water has to the Earth not only nurtures life but can also cause strange death traps. Quicksand, whirlpools and rip currents are death traps, ready to take away the unwary.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts
programme.desc: Lakes are boiled and frogs frozen alive. Plagues of locusts rain down and snow buries a city. Explore global weather wipeouts from Maryland to the Middle East.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Noisy Nature
programme.desc: In this episode, the weather creates a strange symphony. Light sabre sounds mysteriously resonate from icy lakes, rocks ring like bells and deadly multiple twisters roar and rage across the earth.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Sand Tsunami
programme.desc: Witness haboobs, hoodoos, ice chimneys and a lake with leopard spots.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A dozen security guards try to subdue an enraged man; a tearful mother forgives her son's killer; two tasers can't stop a defendant desperate for freedom.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Chaos ensues during a brawl in a courtroom; a bailiff dives down a flight of stairs after an escapee; a defendant threatens a judge's life.

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A doctor who was wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes and goes in search of the real killer to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: A passersby reaction to Sal burying his niece in the park, the rare outcome of a Joker vs. Joker challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Training Day
programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Christmas
programme.desc: Adam teaches his sister that the story of the real St. Nick is a lot creepier than she thought, while modern Santa was created by commercialism only a century ago. Adam also illustrates why the act of gift-giving actually hurts the economy.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Football
programme.desc: Adam hits the gridiron to show why the playoffs rarely determine which team is best, and he explores how sports drink hydration myths are putting kids at risk.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nutrition
programme.desc: Adam shows why vitamin supplements don't make us any healthier, and that the 'balanced breakfast' we've been sold is anything but. Later, he reveals how most of the nutritional science the media reports on isn't science at all.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Ice
programme.desc: Michael rehashes a potato laser, re-designs an emergen-suit, and takes another shot on the ice and more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Aztec Portal
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Surprise Laughs
programme.desc: The most hilarious blunders, jokes, pranks, and fails. See what happens when a show-off tries to slide down the railing of an escalator. Then, check out the beachgoer who taunts Mother Nature and incurs the wrath of the sea.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Outrageous Surprises
programme.desc: Watch as a Russian road explosion creates the world's biggest pothole. Then, two kids pull off a prank that really 'bugs' their mom.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Outrageous Antics
programme.desc: Learn the meaning of 'car trouble' in this collection of four wheel fails. Watch a snoozing frat boy get a rude awakening, and find out how a horse snuck its way into a family wedding album.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Boneheaded Blunders
programme.desc: Find out why doing a wheelie on your lawnmower is a bad idea, and see what happens when senior citizens try to get in on the video game action.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Book TV

programme.title: Las Vegas: Big Ed De-Cline
programme.desc: Ed is told to relax but he soon finds out that he has become the victim of identity theft.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Real Mccoy
programme.desc: Danny tracks down the identity of the mystery woman who appears in photos with his father and, despite warnings from Mike and Mary, he offers to give her money for an outstanding medical expense. Later, Danny becomes suspicious of his new flame, Penny.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Everything Old Is You Again
programme.desc: When Danny visits an antique fair at the Montecito he becomes the focus of a flash back to the Jubilee Hotel and Casino circa 1962 where he is the director of entertainment.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bold, Beautiful and Blue
programme.desc: Danny, Monica and FBI Agent Portis review the security measures taken to protect the Kashmir Sapphire, a priceless gemstone on loan and display at the Montecito, from theft. Meanwhile, Monica tries to lure Ed back to the Montecito with lavish gifts.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Mothwoman
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a comic book convention and Monica questions Danny's decision to have it at the hotel, after she's mistaken for Mothwoman by the comic book fans. Meanwhile, Sam runs into an old nemesis at a funeral and sparks fly.

programme.title: Las Vegas: For Sail by Owner
programme.desc: A hostile takeover of the Montecito casino is thwarted by a stunning change of events. Mike is mugged by a thug, leaving Danny to seek revenge. Meanwhile, Delinda is smitten by a blind man who keeps his real life a secret from her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Down and Dirty
programme.desc: When a televised national poker tour comes to the Montecito, Danny and Mike investigate their hunch that someone is cheating. Elsewhere, Sam battles with Casey over their divorce settlement, and demands half ownership of the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: When diamonds are stolen from the Montecito pool taping of a Fat Joe music video, Danny and Ed rely on amateur sex video footage to track down the thief. Elsewhere, Sam and Mary set out to reveal Mike's secret as a male stripper named Hot Chocolate.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Bitch Is Back
programme.desc: The Montecito prepares for the opening of Wolfgang Puck's seventh Vegas restaurant. Elsewhere, hotel guests become frightened when they begin to have ghostly encounters. Sam wagers a bet with her nemesis to see who is the best host in Vegas.

programme.title: Las Vegas: And Here's Mike With the Weather
programme.desc: Ed and Danny try to track down $2.9 million worth of irregularities in the Montecito's books. Meanwhile, Danny's former marine sergeant visits and Danny offers him a job at the casino. Elsewhere, Mike gets to fulfill his dream of reporting the weather.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Urban Legends
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a car show and NASCAR driver Jimmie Johnson comes to Las Vegas to act as a celebrity judge. Meanwhile, an urban legend comes to life when Danny and Mike discover a man with a missing kidney lying in a bathtub full of ice.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: When Monica's friend Norma finds a finger in the Montecito's new buffet, everyone braces for a lawsuit. However, Norma tells Ed she only wants one thing: Danny. Meanwhile, Sam has a difficult time dealing with a tough customer.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Lyle and Substance
programme.desc: A thief complicates matters when he claims that he met someone who plans to blow up the Montecito. Ed sees this as the thief's ploy to get out of trouble but Danny feels it is necessary to investigate. Meanwhile, Sam hears rumours about the new masseur.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Like a Virgin
programme.desc: Mary finds herself coordinating an extravagant wedding for one of Sam's whales. Meanwhile, Ed and Danny are up against card counters of very unusual sorts, and Mike chases a woman who, unbeknownst to him, is attending a Born Again Virgin conference.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Cash Springs Eternal
programme.desc: Danny and Mike investigate a string of robberies in the residential suites and, in their spare time, pose for a charity beefcake calendar. Meanwhile, Jillian panics when her therapist says her marriage to Ed sets a bad example for Delinda.

programme.title: Las Vegas: All Quiet on the Montecito Front
programme.desc: Even Danny and Delinda are surprised when sparks fly between them. Meanwhile, Montecito owner Casey declares that all department heads must go on a team-building paintball retreat and while there, Casey tries his luck with Mary.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: Ed and Jillian set off on a retreat that proves to be anything but peaceful. Meanwhile, Danny and Mike contend with a suspicious heavy hitter who wants to be a million dollars a hand. Elsewhere, the romance between Delinda and Dr. Derek is heating up.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Fidelity, Security, Delivery
programme.desc: Things heat up at the Montecito when athlete Sasha Cohen stops by. Meanwhile, Delinda provides Dr. Derek with an answer to his marriage proposal. Elsewhere, Danny and Mike help a couple of big gamblers find out if their spouses are being unfaithful.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: One of the ladies at the Montecito is preparing to walk down the aisle. The impending wedding causes old love to resurface and turmoil to brew. It also sets the stage for the mischief and mayhem of bachelor and bachelorette parties.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Father of the Bride Redux
programme.desc: While Ed is attacked by gunmen, an emotional Delinda admits her feelings for Danny. Elsewhere, Sam travels to Hawaii to contend with a whale who won't vacate the Montecito's Hawaiian villas.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Died in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Ed returns from a secret trip to Morocco with shocking news about his past. Meanwhile, Danny and Delinda's romance continues to heat up. Elsewhere, Mike travels to Hawaii to help Sam with her 'whale' problem.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Story of Owe
programme.desc: Sam returns to Las Vegas and finds herself in financial trouble after three of her recent clients stiffed the Montecito. Elsewhere, Ed devises a situation to prove to the wife of a high-roller that her husband is not weak and boring.

programme.title: Las Vegas: History of Violins
programme.desc: Vegas heats up as Jordan Cavanaugh and Woody Holt come to the Montecito, hot on the trail of a murder and a missing rare violin. Meanwhile, the Montecito is dealing with its own missing items: someone has robbed the casino's safe deposit vault.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Delinda's Box
programme.desc: Ed and Danny only have twelve hours to save Delinda from her kidnappers, so they must steal 50 million dollars from the Montecito or she will be buried alive.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: An Egg-cellent Adventure
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli welcomes four chefs to Lazy Acres Market in Hermosa Beach, Calif., where they have to stake out unsuspecting shoppers and convince them to part with their carts.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Stake Out Your Surf and Turf
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli welcomes four chefs to Bristol Farms market in Calabasas, Calif., where they go off the deep end searching for shoppers whose carts are full of fantastic ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Seafood Battle
programme.desc: Four seafood specialists battle it out in Flavortown. Guy Fieri limits the chefs to just ten ingredients in the first round, and then all the ingredients for their second dish must start with the same random letter.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Guys
programme.desc: Four chefs from four of Guy Fieri's own restaurants face off in two rounds of culinary combat. Guy kicks things off by challenging his guys to make their best burger without any key ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: No-Shop Showdown
programme.desc: For the first time in GGG history, none of the competing chefs get to shop for their ingredients. Instead, Guy Fieri gives them each a cart full of groceries that has to last all three rounds, and he decides what they make in each round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Big League Teams
programme.desc: America's favourite pastime comes to Flavortown when Guy Fieri invites three former Major League Baseball players to team up with GGG all-star judges in hopes of hitting a culinary home run.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: GGG at Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri send mystery ingredients to their favourite chefs, who have to use them in burgers and seafood dinners made in their own kitchens. Guy and Hunter play some of Flavortown's classic games to add to the chefs' culinary difficulties.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Battle of the Bacon
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four swine-dining chefs to go hog-wild for a shot at $20,000. Over two rounds and a plethora of pork plates, these competitors will have to show up and show snout if they want to win the all-bacon battle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Big League Teams
programme.desc: America's favourite pastime comes to Flavortown when Guy Fieri invites three former Major League Baseball players to team up with GGG all-star judges in hopes of hitting a culinary home run.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Healthy Kickstart
programme.desc: After years on tour with husband Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood is looking forward to settling back into a routine. Always on the search for a fun workout, Trisha invites her friend, Natalie, to check out the hippest new workout -- goat yoga.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Gal's Best Friend
programme.desc: To celebrate the adoption anniversary of her dog, Millie, Trisha Yearwood makes a healthy lunch with her friend, Lisa, before taking their dogs on a hike.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Clean Eats
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli starts the New Year off right with a menu that's big on flavor but low on guilt, including slow cooker steel cut oats, grilled chopped vegetable salad, kale and artichoke chicken casserole, and healthy banana-cherry custard.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Turning Over a New Leaf
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli's friend, food blogger Jo Stougaard, needs help reworking some of her favourite weeknight dishes to fit her low-carb lifestyle.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: A Little Healthier
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shakes up some well-loved recipes and makes them a little healthier. She puts a spin on the family's takeout favorite, General Tso's chicken, and skips the crust for her classic apple pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Almost Healthy
programme.desc: Ree is making almost healthy and totally fabulous versions of classics. There's everyone's favourite cheeseburger sliders with portobellos instead of buns, fantastic cauliflower fried rice, zucchini lasagna and almost-instant fast and fruity ice cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lighter 16-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Ree cooks against the clock to make four of her favorite recipes over into lighter, healthier 16-minute meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Meatless Marvels
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has stocked her kitchen with all the ingredients to make some of her favorite meatless meals, and she's whipping up broccoli cheese baked potatoes, Greek grilled eggplant steaks and roasted vegetable panzanella.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Norwegian Celebration
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is cooking for a Norwegian dinner celebration on the farm, starting with Lefse hot dogs with fennel slaw and open face salmon and avocado sandwiches. She also makes crispy paprika fries with dill mayo and a stunning Norwegian wreath cake.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Drive-Thru Redo
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites her fast-food loving friend over for homemade versions with a lighter touch. The menu includes a double patty veggie burger with a special sauce that goes perfectly with oven-baked onion rings and baked apple hand pies for dessert.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Food Forecast
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts share their predictions for which supermarket veggies will rocket from staple to superstar this year. They make eggplant parmesan boats and vegetable top salad with walnut dressing and actress Maureen McCormick stops by to chat.

programme.title: First Look: Discovery Plus: Discovery Plus Lifestyle
Beat Bobby Flay: Grind it Out!
programme.desc: Los Angeles chef Michael Voltaggio and skateboarding legend Tony Hawk know they can't skate through this competition. They bring in Sichuan master Pablo Zitzmann and young gun Ming Pu to attempt to kick-flip Bobby Flay out of his arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Family Matters
programme.desc: It's a family affair when father-and-son chefs Beto and Julian Rodarte battle it out to prove that the only thing stronger than family is their desire to beat Bobby Flay! Cookbook author Daphne Oz and model Jourdan Dunn judge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chi-Town Throws Down
programme.desc: Actress Sophia Bush and Chef Carla Hall decide which Windy City chef, Aaron Cuschieri or Jill Barron, has what it takes to blow Bobby Flay out of the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Making Headlines
programme.desc: Dylan Dreyer of "The Today Show" is paired up with "Chopped's" Scott Conant against their friend and challenger Bobby Flay. An island battle is fought between Jamaican chef Patrick Simpson and Hawaiian chef Alvin Savella.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Drop The Beat (Bobby)!
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon and actress Brooke Shields band together to take Bobby Flay down. With Italian chef and restaurateur Carla Pellegrino and Atlanta's Idris Muhammad on their side, Bobby will be singing a different tune.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Obinray
programme.desc: The Titans start speaking Pig Latin to prevent Robin from eavesdropping.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Squash and Stretch
programme.desc: The Titans learn about cartoon-style violence in order to get revenge on a snack-stealing squirrel.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Batman vs. Teen Titans: Dark Injustice
programme.desc: The Titans try to outprank each other on April Fools' Day.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Garage Sale
programme.desc: Robin makes the other Titans sell their treasured mementos from past episodes.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Wally T
programme.desc: The Titans discover the magic of 'fan strength' thanks to their number one fan, Wally T!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Rad Dudes With Bad Tudes
programme.desc: After seeing a pair of cool dudes on rollerblades, Robin tries to be just like them.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Who's Laughing Now
programme.desc: With manliness achieved (thanks to armpit hairs), Beast Boy is ready to find his spirit animal, which will teach him important life lessons about the real world.

programme.title: Movie: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: After an agent from the Department of National Wildlife Control threatens to put an end to the bear’s fun, Grizz, Panda, and Ice Bear decide to head to Canada.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mothers/ The Password
programme.desc: On Mother's Day, the kids put the mothers through a series of trials to find out who the best mother is. When the kids find out Anais is Richard's favourite child, Gumball and Darwin try to take the title.

programme.title: Final Space: The Happy Place
programme.desc: The crew gets trapped in a happy ship where things aren't what they seem, and Gary must confront the human cost of having lost earth.

programme.title: American Dad!: Big Trouble in Little Langley
programme.desc: When Francine's adopted parents stop by for an unannounced stay, Stan is furious that they refuse to assimilate to his 'man of the house' ways.

programme.title: American Dad!: Haylias

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Paint It, Pierce It or Plug It
programme.desc: Alan has concerns when Jake brings his 36-year-old girlfriend home for a visit. Meanwhile, Walden tries to keep a secret from Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Advantage: Fat, Flying Baby
programme.desc: Walden, depressed about being single on Valentine's Day, tries to convince Kate to give him another chance. Meanwhile, Alan's Valentine's Day plans take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Throgwarten Middle School Mysteries

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The 9:04 From Pemberton
programme.desc: Following a fight with Walden, Alan moves in with Herb.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Episode: Someone Stole a Spoon

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bazinga! That's From a TV Show
programme.desc: When Jake cheats on his girlfriend with her 18-year-old daughter, Alan and Walden get caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Another Night With Neil Diamond
programme.desc: Alan has trouble coping when Lyndsey dumps him and Walden must find a way to help him get back on his feet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cows, Prepare to Be Tipped
programme.desc: Walden dates a hot 22-year-old but finds himself more interested in her grandmother. Meanwhile, Alan and Jake go on a father-son bonding trip.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nangnangnangnang

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think I Banged Lucille Ball

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Unblessed Biscuit

programme.desc: As Carrie approaches her 35th birthday, Doug bribes construction workers to hoot at her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Black List

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Barb moves in with Christine after announcing that she and Pete plan to divorce. Meanwhile, when Barb moves in, Matthew relocates to Ritchie's room where he discovers his nephew's strange sleep habits.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Champ
programme.desc: When 'meanie moms' Marly and Lindsay guilt Christine into serving hot lunch at Ritchie's school, she finds herself serving with Stan and vows not to sleep with him again. Meanwhile, she and Matthew decide they must take control of their dating lives.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Playdate With Destiny
programme.desc: Christine's crush on Mr. Harris makes her lose her composure around him at Ritchie's school's fundraising gala. When Ritchie wins the raffle prize of a playdate with him, Christine is thrilled, until Richard's father-son plans threaten to spoil the fun.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Women 'N Tuition
programme.desc: Christine tries to make some sacrifices in order to pay for Ritchie's rising school tuition. Meanwhile, Matthew realizes he hasn't been living up to his potential and considers some extreme changes.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: What About Barb?

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: My Favorite Moments: The Chosen Ones
programme.desc: Tia races to give four dogs in a rural Louisiana shelter a second chance. A skittish, shy dog gets a shot at a forever home, while a unique canine is chosen for a Pennsylvania prison dog program.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: My Favorite Moments: Future Unknown
programme.desc: When Mariah and Spencer find a dog left behind an abandoned home, they discover its severe injuries. A couple eagerly searches for a fur-friend for their bulldog, and one of Villalobos' beloved parolees is arrested.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: My Favorite Moments: Search and Surrender
programme.desc: Mariah comes to help a homeless woman struggling to surrender her beloved pit bull. The perfect pair of dogs are matched with former adopters, while Lizzy prepares for one her favorite rescues.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: My Favorite Moments: Lucky Dog Found
programme.desc: Toney and Earl come to the rescue of a hostile dog found in front of an abandoned home. A stray canine with neurological issues is need of Mariah's help, while Tia and Lizzy escort a pit bull to its potential forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: My Favorite Moments: Troubled Hounds
programme.desc: A couple returns hoping to reunite their adoptee with an old fur-friend. A hound is found in desperate condition, and Mariah hopes to get VRC's first Louisiana rescue on the road to recovery.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: 200th Episode
programme.desc: The Villalobos crew celebrates 200 episodes and recount precious memories. From Mariah's beauty pageant days, to memorable rescues, like Walter and Buffy. They reminisce on what it was like to film and the highs and lows of living the rescue life.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Raised in Rescue
programme.desc: Return adopters visit Villalobos to find a dog that will feel at home on their boat. Tania and Mariah head out to rescue a stray that is hiding beneath a shipping container. And parolee Jammall starts to slip up, risking his future at the rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: 200th Episode
programme.desc: The Villalobos crew celebrates 200 episodes and recount precious memories. From Mariah's beauty pageant days, to memorable rescues, like Walter and Buffy. They reminisce on what it was like to film and the highs and lows of living the rescue life.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pitch Black
programme.desc: A midnight rescue finds Tia, Tania and new employee Perry scrambling after an injured dog. With the kennels pushed to the limit, a familiar face arrives returns to lend a helping hand.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shell Shocked
programme.desc: Ten dogs left to die in deplorable conditions are rescued. Tia helps a family find the perfect companion for their special needs teenager, which takes a turn for the bizarre when she learns about the family's exotic pet.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Giving Back
programme.desc: Two stray pit bulls hiding beneath a two-ton stack of lumber lure Tia into a dramatic and potentially deadly rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Puppy-Palooza
programme.desc: Tia comes face to face with a protective mother and her litter of seven puppies. New parolee William must step up to keep control of all the rowdy pups at Villalobos.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: When Deer Attack
programme.desc: Game Wardens patrol the Rio Grande in search of an unidentified body.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas game wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water. Hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property. The game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wildcat Garage
programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas. In East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer. On the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Movie: The Family That Preys
programme.desc: Two families of different backgrounds have to learn to work together despite the odds against them.

programme.title: Movie: Think Like a Man Too

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Big Happy Family

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail

programme.title: The Parkers: It's a Family Affair

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Horrificator

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Desert Lair of Doom

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: See No Evil: Beth's Last Party
programme.desc: On December 23rd 2009, Beth von Steinner goes missing. Days later, her frozen body is found in a trash pile behind her house. With no witness or suspects, only CCTV footage can unlock the mystery of who killed her.

programme.title: See No Evil: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: On October 26th, 2009, widower Philip Gatusso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo, North Dakota. As his in-laws drive across states to care for their now orphaned granddaughter, detectives to turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video.

programme.title: See No Evil: Rhonda's Gone
programme.desc: On December 2nd 2014, Rhonda Daugherty vanishes. Detectives turn to the public for information on her mysterious disappearance. A tip leads investigators to surveillance footage from a hotel where they uncover a journey of duplicity and deception.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Great Don Lewis
programme.desc: Donald Lewis is a popular musician who owns a local Jazz Cafe. Despite being beloved in the community, mystery strikes when he suddenly disappears from his jazz club along with his employee. Detectives must find the both of them before it's too late.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Blind Love
programme.desc: Thirty-one-year-old, Gabriel Montanez is found shot in a liquor store parking lot in Kalamazoo, Michigan. Two men in hooded sweatshirts are seen fleeing from the scene. Police then make a shocking discovery that leads to the truth behind the homicide.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: He's Not Going to Stop
programme.desc: Dr. Stephen Pitt, Veleria Sharp, Laura Anderson, Marshall Levine, Bryon Thomas and Mary Simmons are dead. Now, bodycam video captures the hunt of the spree shooter as he stays one step ahead. Before it's over, a shootout uncovers a raging madman.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: A wealthy labour lawyer shoots his high profile wife from the back seat of a car, and questions are raised about whether it was an accident or plain murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunter
programme.desc: When a young U.S. army combat medic goes missing, a bounty hunter takes on his biggest case ever, to find Kelli Bordeaux.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Wind
programme.desc: A daughter's quest to see her birth mother's murder solved is complicated

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Salt in the Wound
programme.desc: An independent young woman starting out in life on her own, becomes the victim of a bizarre and vicious homicide in her apartment.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Hero Who Wasn't
programme.desc: When a couple enters their home during a robbery in progress, a deadly shoot out erupts, leaving two people dead. But when police begin an investigation they discover clues that it may not have been what it appears to be.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Buried Dreams
programme.desc: In 2007 in Bethany, Oklahoma, a young pregnant woman goes missing. Police desperately try to retrace her last steps, and unearth more than just the secrets she harbored.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Ride Along
programme.desc: One night in 1993, in Manhattan Beach, California, an officer is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop. The only witness is a young boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Lost Highway
programme.desc: In 1996, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, a young mother is found dead on the side of a rural stretch of highway in an apparent hit-and-run accident. But as the family grieves, the façade begins to crack, and soon the truth seeps out.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Know My Brother's Name
programme.desc: When Karen Kuzma was a little girl, she adored her older brother. As they grew older, she saw changes in him that she didn't understand, but it never occurred to her that he was becoming the most infamous serial killer in American history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting our oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting our oceans.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Preserving a Passion That's 'In-Tents'
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lakeside Marina
programme.desc: The crew travel to Smith Mountain Lake to save parts off a sinking boat. While at the marina, they discover other boats on the property to salvage. At the warehouse, Mike builds a commissioned bar from wine barrels for a local winery.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Good Eats: Cubing Around

programme.title: Good Eats: House of the Rising Bun

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off the most scrumptious and seriously stunning sandwiches ever created. These shockers prove that there are truly no limits to what can be placed between two slices of bread.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Atlanta
programme.desc: We're headed to Atlanta, one of the largest cities in the South, for some of the best things we ever ate. From barbecued rib tips and top-secret burgers, to 'angry' mussels that will make your day.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England
programme.desc: We're in New England, the birthplace of the American Revolution, for some of our favourite food. We sample Boston cream pie, sticky buns, and Szechuan sliced fish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Central New York
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the local favorites in central New York, finding beef and veal sausages at one of America's oldest hot dog stands, half-moon cookies that predate New York City's iconic black and white cookie and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, including salted and dried cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, sponge cake and Port wine.
