programme.title: The Loud House: Along Came a Sister/ Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln causes trouble when he loses the class tarantula during his turn taking care of it. Lincoln declares a strike until he can convince someone to switch chores with him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Spell It Out
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy uses a spell book to teach them a lesson.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom /Welcome to Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. Then, SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Rise of the Turtles
programme.desc: When Splinter allows his teenage sons, the Mutant Ninja Turtles, to visit the surface for the first time, they discover that the surface world isn't as simple as it first appears.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Monkey Brains

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Never Say Xever
programme.desc: Leo fears his act of mercy has come back to haunt him when Xever holds a local noodle shop owner hostage.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush

programme.title: The Thundermans: Save the Past Dance
programme.desc: Tired of hearing tales of Hiddenville's legendary mayor, the kids use a time machine to travel back 60 years to disprove the myths.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Can't Hardly Date

programme.title: The Thundermans: Make It Pop Pop
programme.desc: Nana and Pop Pop Thunderman come to visit, but when Phoebe reveals Colosso is living in their house, Pop Pop's no-tolerance attitude toward supervillains leads him to banish Max and his bunny best friend to the Detention Zone.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Gas or Fail

programme.title: Walk the Prank: School Clubbing

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention

programme.desc: An author gets involved in the lives of students at her alma mater.

programme.title: Movie: Shallow Hal

programme.title: Movie: The Weight of Gold
programme.desc: Olympic athletes discuss the subject of mental health.

programme.title: Your Honor: Part One

programme.title: Your Honor: Part Two
programme.desc: On the anniversary of his wife's death, Judge Michael Desiato and his son Adam create an alibi for the day of the accident. A favor for Michael pulls his close friends and colleagues Charlie and Lee into the web of deception.

programme.title: Your Honor: Part Three
programme.desc: Michael continues to use his power to obscure details of the accident as crime lord Jimmy Baxter and his wife Gina plot their revenge. Things aren't adding up for Lt. Nancy Costello in her investigation.

programme.title: Your Honor: Part Four
programme.desc: Complicit in multiple lies and agonized by guilt, Adam moves from one dangerous liaison to another as tensions escalate. Elizabeth steps in to protect her grandson. Family dinner at the Desiatos is plagued by secrets and lies.

programme.title: Movie: Dark Waters
programme.desc: An attorney risks his career and family when he uncovers a dark secret that connects unexplained deaths to one of the world's largest corporations.

programme.title: Movie: 21 Bridges
programme.desc: In an attempt to capture ruthless cop killers, an NYPD detective shuts down the city's bridges.

programme.title: Your Honor: Part Four

programme.desc: An American expat in London unknowingly starts a gang war when he attempts to sell his highly profitable marijuana empire.

programme.title: Movie: Zeroville
programme.desc: Ike 'Vikar' arrives into Hollywood in 1969, makes an impression on an actress and begins his journey through the film business in the 1970s.

programme.title: Movie: The Strangers

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2020 Week 16

programme.title: Movie: Little Fockers
programme.desc: A tightly wound father-in-law still has doubts about his son-in-law, even after 10 years of marriage to his daughter.

programme.title: Movie: The Big Lebowski

programme.desc: Chrissy takes Kimbella and Juju to Philly to try and save her real estate business. Erica Mena and Safaree face a painful decision. Rich Dollaz is ready to work with up and coming rapper Jennaske. And a perfume release is anything but sweet.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Some Sticky Big Bizness
programme.desc: Yandy pitches her business plan to the Mayor of Newark. Joe Budden and Tahiry explore a new relationship. Newcomer Jennaske pits Rich Dollaz against Phresher. Erica Mena discovers a text that jeopardizes her wedding. And Chrissy confronts Yandy.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Ex’s & Oh’s
programme.desc: Safaree is forced to set things right to save his wedding. Cyn confronts Erica about her plan to match Tahiry back with Joe. Phresher must fight to keep Jennaske from jumping ship after Jen's public explosion. Remy goes to Miami to finish her album.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Between a Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Erica and Safaree's joint bachelor, bachelorette party takes a turn when an unexpected guest arrives. Yandy gets some surprising news. Jennaske's decision to work exclusively with Rich Dollaz causes backlash. PHresher's past comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Happily Mena After
programme.desc: After the chaos of his bachelor party, Safaree gets cold feet about the wedding. Erica gets some timely advice from Remy Ma.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Whose Birthday Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Erica Mena's birthday bash takes a turn when Tahiry confronts Cyn. Jim Jones learns to cook with Joe to rekindle his romance with Chrissy. Jada demands her money back from PHresher. Tahiry gets some terrifying health news.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: December to Remember
programme.desc: Olivia returns to New York to revive her music career but must confront Chrissy and Rich first. Yandy's prison reform protest in Mississippi could jeopardize Mendeecees' release. Remy's new legal troubles may send her back to prison.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Lingerie Goes Left
programme.desc: Yandy hosts an event to raise money for Jonathan's nephew. Rich's investigation into Olivia's money dispute leads him to his old rival Cisco. Jim has a secret to reveal to Mama Jones about Chrissy. Kimbella and Yandy's beef comes to a violent clash.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Spirituali-Tea
programme.desc: Somaya attempts to mend Yandy and Kimbella's feud with the healing power of her spiritual tea. Joe and Cyn show up together to Erica's baby shower, sending Tahiry on a spiral. Safaree works on his new album. Remy faces her court date with Pap.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Straitt Outta Brooklyn
programme.desc: Erica's pregnancy is reaching full term but Safaree's new album threatens to pull him away. Jim shows Mama Jones her new house. PHresher has to settle his debt with Jada before Jenn finds out. Remy's legal fate is revealed.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Mind Your Dollaz
programme.desc: Olivia meets with Cisco about her money dispute with Rich. Meanwhile, Remy books a major performance, and Jim records for Juelz's new album.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Baby Mena Drama
programme.desc: Safaree risks missing the birth of his daughter. The Creep Squad's meeting about Olivia goes left. Jenn reconsiders her future with Phresher. Chrissy considers a new opportunity. Yandy prepares for Mendeecee's long awaited prison release.

programme.title: Martin: Snow White
programme.desc: When the gang goes skiing, everything goes downhill.

programme.title: Martin: Come on Over to My Place
programme.desc: Cole's new girlfriend Shanise forces him to move into his own apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Waiting, Debating and Ovulating

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2
programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.desc: Will and Carleton almost ruin everything for Hilary's show; Ashley wants to move to NY.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Done

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Atlanta: Bobbit It Off

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Atlanta: No Witness, No Protection
programme.desc: There's trouble in paradise for besties Sierra and Karlie when Karlie is a no-show at Sierra's court date. Up and coming rap superstar LightSkinKeisha is on the scene with her man Coca Vango by her side.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Atlanta: Oh Deer
programme.desc: Former besties Karlie and Sierra are left reeling after their brawl. Bambi has it out for alleged homewrecker LightSkinKeisha. Stevie uncovers Mimi's deep seated abandonment issues. And Scrappy worries Momma Dee is drinking again.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Atlanta: Queen of Atlanta
programme.desc: Akbar goes to war with LightSkinKeisha over her throne as queen of Atlanta. Scrappy and Bambi seek peace for their family, but their moms have other plans in mind. Newbie Kiyomi Leslie is on the scene. And Shooter juggles his messy love life.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Atlanta: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Rasheeda decides to whisk the girls away for a ski trip, but a Frost family crisis gets in the way. Sierra and Shooter are also in crisis when their daughter is assaulted at school. Alexis opens up about her traumatic past.

programme.title: Movie: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: An author publishes her first novel, but it fails to sell well so she embarks on a book tour. While on tour, she meets a handsome fantasy-author that helps boost her sales, and a romance quickly follows.

programme.title: Movie: Taking a Shot at Love
programme.desc: A professional dancer uses ballet to help a hockey player get back in the game.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: A woman is a final contestant on a dating show and faces off against her high-school sweetheart during the 'Hometown Date.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.desc: Frasier tries to find a quiet corner to read his book, but he is always disturbed.

programme.desc: A newspaper critic puts down Frasier's radio show, forcing him to retaliate on the air.

programme.title: Frasier: Here's Looking at You

programme.title: Frasier: The Crucible
programme.desc: Frasier throws a dinner party to showcase his new painting, only to have the artist declare it a forgery. His attempt at retribution is foiled by a frightened Niles.

programme.title: Reba: You Make Me Sick
programme.desc: Cheyenne hides morning sickness from Van, and Reba's neighbour won't let Jake sleep over.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include Katee Sackoff, Tom Everett Scott and Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: Movie: My Secret Valentine
programme.desc: A young woman takes advice from the chalkboard notes that her mysterious house rental tenant leaves when a slick sales rep arrives with plans to buy her family prized winery.

programme.title: Movie: Date With Love
programme.desc: After a-list actress, Alex Allen, has an epic Hollywood meltdown, she is in need of some positive publicity. Salvation comes in the form of a small town boy's video 'promposal' in which the student invites Alex to prom.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: A Boy and a Priest
programme.desc: A very special relationship has developed between Butters and the Parish Priest. When the town finds the church doors locked and no sign of the pair, they call in the Catholic Church.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Isn't Free

programme.title: South Park: A Scause for Applause
programme.desc: A serious doping scandal shakes everyone's faith in a beloved icon. Everyone who once supported the fallen hero is now cutting off their symbolic yellow wristbands.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Pee
programme.desc: The boys' fun-filled day at the water park turn deadly when the pool's pee vs. water ratio reaches catastrophic levels.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Duane Ollinger believes there's a fortune of gold buried beneath his property in Utah, Blind Frog Ranch. But even though the land seems to be fighting him at every turn, he's not going to stop until he gets his hands on the gold, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Tsunami Evacuation
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes Homer, triggering a tsunami warning and evacuation. Eivin and Eve traverse treacherous mountain terrain on their first-ever goat hunt and Charlotte creates a special memorial for victims of COVID-19.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed
programme.desc: Episodes of 'Alaska: The Last Frontier' with tweets, facts, and frontier extras.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Fighting Fire With Fire
programme.desc: To protect the homestead from wildfires, Otto dynamites a reservoir in case of an emergency. Charlotte goes fishing with Jane but finds it's not for her. After falling behind on the Fox Cabin, Atz Sr. enlists the help of his family to get back on track.

programme.title: Cal Fire: Sacrifice
programme.desc: The first major fire of the year erupts in Southern California and Engineer Dudley risks missing his daughter's birthday. In Redding, Station 43 gets a call to put down a fast-moving blaze in an area filled with dangerous power lines.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Game of Bones and Unknowns
programme.desc: Josh explores the beauty of the spiritual realm. He investigates a German basilica said to house the bones of 11,000 virgins, a Japanese ice cave guarded by a dragon's spirit and a remote island where cats outnumber humans.

programme.title: Secrets of the Secret Service

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Big, Bad C-10 Build
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron build their coolest hot rod, a 1976 Chevy C-10 short bed show truck to be auctioned at the Cattle Baron's Ball.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Big, Bad C-10 Build, Part II
programme.desc: The plan to build Gas Monkey's coolest show truck continues as Richard hopes to deliver a 1976 Chevy C-10 to the Cattle Baron's Ball. Meanwhile, Richard tries to flip a '66 Continental and a '51 Caddy. Also, Richard stops by Fired Up to check on the rent.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Back to the '80s in a '68 Coronet
programme.desc: Richard buys a '69 Malibu only to realize there are massive issues. Aaron crashes into a '68 Coronet on the GMG lot. Richard travels to St. Louis to buy a tricked out '79 Camaro. Motley Crue performs at Gas Monkey Live grand opening.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Supping Up a Super Ford GT, Part I
programme.desc: When Richard brings a smashed up 2005 Ford GT back to the shop with the intention of making a quick repair for a fast profit, Aaron talks him into giving it the full Gas Monkey treatment.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Supping Up a Super Ford GT, Part II
programme.desc: As work on the smashed up 2005 Ford GT continues, Richard heads to Indiana to try to sell a Shelby Cobra prop car used in the superhero movie 'Iron Man.'

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Revved Up: Racing a '67 Dodge Dart, Part I

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Revved Up: Racing a '67 Dodge Dart, Part II
programme.desc: With engine problems on the Dart threatening to stop their big drag race with Roadkill before it starts, Richard and Aaron could face epic humiliation in front of millions of fans.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Revved Up: The Shorty Short VW Bus
programme.desc: When Richard buys a VW Microbus no one really knows the mechanics of this German car. Later, Richard and Aaron discover that the Fired Up garage is attending a demolition derby and Richard has a trick up his sleeve to send his former employees reeling.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Revving up a '69 Riviera

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs Black Sheep Pt 2

programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must rescue Cap'n Turbot and Francois' Grandma Tilly after she rides off on a dolphin. Carlos and Tracker call the PAW Patrol to help solve the mystery of a rumbling sound that's upsetting the jungle elephants.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Booters Sherry and Steve deal with threats from an agitated man who wants the boot off. Fatima looks for a new honey on her ticketing beat, but attracts more bees than boys. At the impound lot, Abdul faces a woman who needs her car immediately.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Tow supervisor Brad oversees the mayhem during Greek Week, and the chaos spills over to the tow lot. Larry tries to manage the offenders, while Roberta's sunny disposition is put to the test.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.desc: Four retired officers track down a killer; police wait for advancements in DNA technology.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Officer Down

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Shannon Siders' body was found in the woods, nearly everyone in the small town of Newaygo, Michigan, becomes a suspect. It takes 22 years for a special cold case unit to solve the crime.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Rookies
programme.desc: Three of The First 48's rookie homicide detectives are highlighted in condensed stories in New Orleans, Phoenix and Atlanta.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Women of Homicide

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys for another fun glimpse at their lives direct from their home. The fans decide what's on tonight's menu.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Delinda's Box
programme.desc: Ed and Danny only have twelve hours to save Delinda from her kidnappers, so they must steal 50 million dollars from the Montecito or she will be buried alive.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Meatball Montecito
programme.desc: A look at the elite surveillance team in charge of maintaining security at a large casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: White Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Montecito and everyone reluctantly takes part in Ed's Secret Santa gift exchange. Danny's car, his most prized possession, is stolen on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Wines and Misdemeanors
programme.desc: A very rare wine has been discovered in the wine cellar of the Montecito, which Ed sees as a perfect opportunity to boost the casino's profile.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Fleeting Cheating Meeting
programme.desc: One of Ed's favourite former employees returns to the Montecito for her first wedding anniversary. Ed is suspicious of her husband and forces Mike and Danny to keep a watchful eye on him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Wagers of Sin
programme.desc: Ed, Danny and Mike make a bet to see who's the best security operator and who can find the most waste at The Montecito.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Chicken Is Making My Back Hurt
programme.desc: Certain circumstances have left Ed obligated to take anger management classes, which forces him to seek inner peace since one little blow can put the Montecito's gaming license at risk. Mike tries to purchase a condo but the deal falls through.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Pharaoh 'Nuff
programme.desc: The Montecito prepares for the exhibit of a world famous mummy only to have it stolen before it gets to the hotel. When the authorities cannot deal with the crisis, Mike and Delinda are forced to handle the matter on their own.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Burning Bedouin
programme.desc: Things heat up at the Montecito as Sam's whale and his three wives hit town. When Sam discovers her long-lost love has awakened from a coma, Delinda must be the whale's casino host for the day. Meanwhile, Ed wants to replace his housekeeper.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bare Chested in the Park
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes the Montecito with the unexpected death of someone in the organization. Despite the news, Ed allows the Montecito's company picnic and games to carry on. Mike is appointed as the captain of the 'front of the house' team.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Ed considers retirement and ponders the idea of buying the Montecito. Meanwhile, Danny and Delinda's condo is broken into after Danny refuses to help a gang lord. Elsewhere, Sam learns that she owes millions in unpaid taxes.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Heroes
programme.desc: Mike finds out that Sam has been kidnapped by one of her whales; Danny helps a friend avoid being deployed to Iraq. Elsewhere, Delinda learns life-altering news for she and Danny.

programme.title: Las Vegas: A Hero Ain't Nothing But a Sandwich/ Shrink Rap
programme.desc: TV icon Tom Selleck joins the crew of the Montecito as the casino's new owner, A.J. Cooper. In this two-hour season premiere, an incriminating cell phone video turns up as evidence in the murder case, and Ed tries to figure out who robbed the Montecito.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Shrink Rap
programme.desc: The Montecito is in utter chaos along with the lives of the casino staffers. The murder of Mary's father closed a chapter from her past, but leaves everyone else wondering who actually shot him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Glass Is Always Cleaner
programme.desc: Friendships are at stake when new casino owner, A.J. Cooper, tries to make changes at the Montecito. Danny loses confidence that he will be the new president when Cooper opens the applicant search to external candidates.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Head Games
programme.desc: Cooper secures the Pacific Tropic Spokesmodel Search Contest for the Montecito, but things go awry when someone sabotages the contest. Mike tries to find the culprit, but gets distracted by the beautiful women he is protecting.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Run, Cooper, Run
programme.desc: Danny and Mike arrive at Cooper's suite for a meeting, but instead find themselves walking into a murder scene. The two question Cooper who can't remember what happened and claims he is being blackmailed.

programme.title: Las Vegas: When Life Gives You Lemon Bars
programme.desc: Cooper insists on shadowing Sam for the day while she is trying to lure a new whale to the casino, but his presence scares the potential client away.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Adventures in the Skin Trade
programme.desc: Danny and Mike find themselves at a local strip bar for a birthday party, but things go awry when the club owner gets physical with one of the strippers.

programme.title: Las Vegas: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts an environmentally friendly conference. When Delinda tries to go green at home, Danny puts up a fight.

programme.title: Las Vegas: My Uncle's a Gas
programme.desc: Danny finds it difficult to keep up with the job, when he gets a surprise visit from the fire marshal and his alcoholic uncle.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The High Price of Gas
programme.desc: A look at the elite surveillance team in charge of maintaining security at a large casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: A Cannon Carol
programme.desc: The casino staffers are busy making holiday plans, except Mike, who begins to doubt his place in Vegas, as well as in his friends' lives. A modern day Scrooge, Sam invites a client to come to the casino for the holidays.

programme.title: Las Vegas: I Could Eat a Horse
programme.desc: Danny and Mike head to Wyoming to buy a horse that Cooper wants to add to his ranch but this isn't as easy as they thought. Back at the casino, Delinda tries to find a new chef for the restaurant.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Food Star Face-Off
programme.desc: "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell knows a star in the making, and legend Patti LaBelle is a star herself, so together they champion two former Food Network Star competitors, Viet Pham and Dom Tesoriero.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Culinary Validation
programme.desc: Puerto Rican chef Jose Adorno brings his Latin style against Italian chef Adam Halberg, with both fighting to make their mark, while Today show news anchor Natalie Morales and Chopped judge Scott Conant revel in making Bobby sweat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: Former boy bander Lance Bass and bad boy chef Michael Voltaggio are teaming up to put Bobby Flay in his place. On stage in hopes of squaring off with Bobby are Delaware chef Robbie Jester and the Garden State's top-rated French chef, James Laird.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Scott Conant and Property Brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott welcome two contenders who have visited Bobby Flay's house, but left with a sour taste in their mouths. Texan Blythe Beck brings back her bold Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Won't Like Him When He's Angry
programme.desc: Austrian chef Daniel Angerer is out to prove that his last win over Bobby Flay was no fluke, while Jersey restaurateur Jamie Knott hopes to become the new star of Bobby's nightmares.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Peeling Away
programme.desc: Bobby Flay better bust out his rolling pin! Texas pastry chef Amanda Rockman and blast from Bobby's past Vicki Wells roll into the arena for a chance at sweet victory. "Chopped's" Ted Allen and actress Busy Philipps will see who can rise to the occasion.

programme.title: The Making of Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, Chip and Joanna transform a historic gristmill into the stunning home of Joanna's new cooking show.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines: A Family Tradition
programme.desc: Joanna shares a cherished family favorite, Grandpa Stevens' classic Lebanese dish, fatayer, served with a Lebanese salad, hummus and baklava for dessert. After finishing up, Joanna surprises her dad with the leftovers of his favorite meal.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines: A Friendsgiving Feast
programme.desc: Joanna shares one of her favorite meals to make as the seasons change, a rich and delicious Friendsgiving casserole, cranberry sauce, green beans amandine and cherry almond crisp for dessert.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Home Cooking and Date Night
programme.desc: Chefs Anne Burrell and Carla Hall ask 14 recruits to make their favorite homemade recipes. Then the recruits replicate their chef's favorite Asian takeout. Former recruits react to a Derby Day-themed episode of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fey vs. Flay
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli shows Bobby Flay no mercy with fellow mean girl, the hilarious and talented actress Tina Fey. They bring in two more mean girls, celebrity chef Alexcia Smith and former stuntwoman-turned-chef Asia Mei.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Covered Clash
programme.desc: Chef Michael Voltaggio gets help from an extra special guest, celebrated actress Drew Barrymore, to take down Bobby Flay. They bring in fantastic pastry chefs DaVee Harned and Miriam Rieder Taylor, who have a passion for chocolate.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Home Cooking and Date Night
programme.desc: Chefs Anne Burrell and Carla Hall ask 14 recruits to make their favorite homemade recipes. Then the recruits replicate their chef's favorite Asian takeout. Former recruits react to a Derby Day-themed episode of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition.

programme.desc: It’s Movie Night, and the Titans have a hard time deciding who gets to choose which movie they watch.

programme.desc: Robin is determined to continue his winning streak of stopping 52 crimes every year.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Streak: Part Two
programme.desc: Robin’s streak of stopping 52 crimes every year is in jeopardy when members of his team are poached by Kid Flash.

programme.desc: Beast Boy writes a song to tell Raven how he feels about her. Beast Boy goes on tour with his song, but this upsets Raven.

programme.desc: A news sinister Gem arrives, armed with a giant drill that saps the life force of all living things on Earth. In their biggest challenge ever, the Crystal Gems must work together to save all organic life on Earth within 48 hours.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Ma Makes Three
programme.desc: Feeling sorry for a lonely Sophia, Dorothy allows her to come along on a date with her and Dorothy's latest beau. However, pretty soon Sophia begins tagging along on every date which puts a rift in Dorothy's romantic plans.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace
programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Walden, He Die. I Clean Room
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Numero Uno Accidente Lawyer
programme.desc: Walden's date with an accident-prone model goes longer than expected. Meanwhile, Alan dates a woman who shares some surprising personal information with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!
programme.desc: Walden helps Jenny get a second date with a one-night stand. Alan receives a Japanese delicacy from Jake for Christmas, and Walden's Malibu house is alive with questionable Christmas carol lyrics.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Baseball. Boobs. Boobs. Baseball.
programme.desc: Alan lets Lyndsey's boyfriend Larry set him up on a date. Meanwhile, Walden offers to help Nicole with her software project so she'll have time to date him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Fingers of Crème de Menthe
programme.desc: Alan learns that Lyndsey broke up with Larry and didn't tell him. Meanwhile, Walden sets out to prove that he's a man's man.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cab Fare and a Bottle of Pencillin
programme.desc: Alan gives Lyndsey the option of choosing between him and Larry. Meanwhile, Jenny fears she and Brooke are growing apart.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: How to Get Rid of Alan Harper
programme.desc: Walden suspects his new girlfriend is cheating on him. Meanwhile, Alan gets even more intertwined in Lyndsey and Larry's relationship when he starts dating Larry's sister, Gretchen.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Welcome Home, Jake
programme.desc: Lyndsey discovers that Alan is sleeping with Larry's sister, Gretchen. Meanwhile, Walden struggles with telling Barry to find his own place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: West Side Story
programme.desc: Walden gets an invitation to his ex-girlfriends' boutique opening. Meanwhile, Gretchen wants to spend more time at Alan's house.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wish Boned
programme.desc: Doug is ecstatic when he wins two tickets to the NCAA Final Four basketball tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Van Go
programme.desc: Holly discovers that Carrie used her for her van; Doug argues with a feisty waitress.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ice Cubed
programme.desc: Guilt gets the better of Carrie when she seeks refuge from a blizzard in a church.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Catching Hell
programme.desc: While at a Mets game, Doug spills mayonnaise on one of Carrie's most important clients.

programme.title: Roseanne: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Dan is summoned to D.J.'s principal's office when he is caught with obscene reading materials - which he got from Darlene! Meanwhile, Roseanne learns a shocking secret when she presses Jackie about spending time with Fisher.

programme.title: Roseanne: War and Peace

programme.desc: After Russell records thermal imagery he's convinced is Bigfoot, Bryce hurries to have the footage analyzed by experts. The evidence is staggering. Mireya and Ronny have a terrifying experience when they realize they're not along in the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: It Knows We're Here
programme.desc: Mireya's darkest nightmare comes true. Russell investigates a possible Bigfoot underwater passageway. Bryce secures an airship to survey the final square miles for Bigfoot's heat signature.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Final Hours
programme.desc: The team believes they've finally narrowed down where Bigfoot has been hiding throughout their expedition. A high-tech drone is brought in to investigate, and what takes place next is truly astonishing.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: New Evidence
programme.desc: The team re-examines their findings from last year's expedition in Oregon and reveals stunning new evidence. Plus, the new Bigfoot target zone is revealed along with never-before-seen footage of the remarkable next chapter of their journey.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Continues
programme.desc: After coming closer than ever to proving the existence of Bigfoot in Oregon, the team continues their search in the mountains of Kentucky. They'll spend the next two and a half weeks in search of Sasquatch, unless it finds them first.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: A Tribute to Trapper
programme.desc: The remaining members of the AIMS team gather around a campfire to celebrate the life of team leader and friend John 'Trapper' Tice. Tears are shed and laughter echoes throughout the Appalachian night sky as they relive their favorite Trapper moments.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Cherokee Death Cat
programme.desc: The AIMS team continues its quest to get to the bottom of the legend of Spearfinger and sets off to investigate the Cherokee Death Cat, a ferocious feline with a deadly curse.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cash Cash Bang Bang
programme.desc: A first issue 'Spider-Man' comic book swings into the shop. A guy moseys in with an antique 1860 colt army pistol. Old Man checks out a gold mining stock certificate.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: On Guard
programme.desc: The gang checks out a uniform from the King of England's royal guard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Hard Day's Pawn
programme.desc: Twist and shout with the Pawn Stars as they check out a collection of memorabilia.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chummified
programme.desc: A mummified falcon and an autographed Harlem Globetrotter's basketball from 1978 arrive at the shop. The Old Man and Chumlee borrow a metal detector that came in overnight to go treasure hunting, against Rick's wishes.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Capture the Pawn
programme.desc: A rare 1589 book with the instructions for war and fortification, an 1840s chess table, a pair of antique door knockers, and a 1800s experimental rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Legends of Rock
programme.desc: Signed guitar from Def Leopard's Phil Collen, sneakers signed by NBA legend Lebron James.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cowboys and Cannons
programme.desc: A 19th century sun dial cannon, a signed helmet from one of Hollywood's biggest flops, Heaven's Gate, sterling silver baby figurines, a 1964 Beatles board game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnball Wizard
programme.desc: Aim for the high score with the Pawn Stars when a rare Captain Fantastic pinball machine comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Locked Up and Rail Roaded
programme.desc: A 1950s Chrysler Town and Country Newport; a cubist painting by New Zealand artist Louise Henderson; antique railroad locks from the 1800s; an early-1900s self-heating gasoline iron.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mini Miles
programme.desc: Rick and Marie Osmond come across what could potentially be one of the first ever Barbie dolls. Chumlee takes a ride in a tiny amusement park car, while Corey tries to make a deal. A rare 'Citizen Kane' production still may be worth a buy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Business Is Brewing
programme.desc: Rick examines some antique beer memorabilia at the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop. He also takes a trip to a pal's brewery in San Diego to get a history lesson on tap. The guys locate an original McCormick Farmall tractor with a hefty price point.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Stamp Stumped
programme.desc: Rick debates whether a few gold and silver coins are worth cashing in for. Corey struggles to determine the value of some peculiar tax stamps. Chumlee is thrilled when a signed Bob Marley album enters the shop. Rick ponders concertina lessons.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Happiest Place to Pawn
programme.desc: An anti-war speech signed by Dr. Martin Luther King stuns Rick and Corey. Rick and Chum check out a remote-controlled miniature version of a Disney Jungle Cruise ride's boat. A German 'Blue Max' medal from WWI has Rick itchy to justify the seller's price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Payne in the Putt
programme.desc: By a stroke of luck, a pair of knickers that belonged to golfer Payne Stewart swing into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn It Out of the Park
programme.desc: Rick heads east to test a rare weapon from the 18th century. Back at the shop, Corey takes a swing at a Mickey Mantle rookie card. Then, our military expert Alex brews something special for Rick's eyes only.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sign of the Times
programme.desc: Rick Dale joins Rick to prove to Corey that he struck oil with an old Gulf sign. Then, a 1930s collectible from the Indy 500 sends Chumlee racing, and Corey snoops out what might be a Charles Schulz original illustration of Charlie Brown, and more.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Linda and Heather-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv lands a small part on the hit show 'Linda and Heather,' but her role turns out to be bigger than she could have ever imagined. Meanwhile, Joey has to deal with his relationship woes.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Standup-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Joey is nervous when he's invited to perform stand-up comedy at a local restaurant. Parker finds himself in a predicament when he isn't sure if he's asked his fellow classmate to be his partner in a science competition or his date to a school dance.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Ex-a-Rooney
programme.desc: When Maddie and Josh start hanging out again, Joey feels awkward by their rekindled friendship. Meanwhile, Parker and Val find themselves in a jam when competing for a coveted finalist spot in the Mars Madness competition.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Tiny House-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Sing It Live-A-Rooney
programme.desc: As the cast of 'Sing it Live!!!' gets ready for a live televised show, a vocal injury threatens to ruin Liv's performance.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Voice-a-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Big Break-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: End-a-Rooney

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jersey Shore Dogs
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore is in for a dose of discipline when Cesar heads for the boardwalk to help three families deal with their out of control dogs' situations.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Conquers London
programme.desc: Cesar is back in the United Kingdom for another episode of Dog Whisperer, but it isn't all garden parties and high tea.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: With Cesar's UK holiday drawing to a close, he lends a hand to the rehabilitation of three British canines.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anger Management
programme.desc: Cesar helps Robert Schwartzman, the lead singer and guitarist for the rock 'n' roll band Rooney, with his adopted pit bull Sandy.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In a previous episode, Cesar worked with two people who were struggling to overcome their fear of dogs. Now, the tables have turned as Cesar takes on the challenge of helping dogs overcome their fears.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: Things get a little saucy after Dr. Pol is asked to be a judge at the Hearty Harvest Chili Cook Off.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Apocalypse Cow
programme.desc: Dr. Pol stays busy helping a feisty cow with a stinky foot problem, a down-cow taking a treatment that could kill it and Buddy, the Shih Tzu with a bulging eye who's seen better days.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Raging Bulls
programme.desc: Charles is determined to upgrade the computer system at the clinic while Dr. Pol deals with escaping cattle, a wobbly dog that won’t stop walking in circles and an alligator with an attitude.

programme.title: Wildlife Below Zero
programme.desc: Animals around the world struggle to survive the harshest season on the planet.

programme.title: How It's Made: Coins, Cars, and Grocery Carts
programme.desc: Discover how cars, grocery carts, collectible coins, and prototyping are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: The Very First Episode
programme.desc: Follow the production process of aluminum foil, snowboards, soft polymer contact lenses and bread and find out how each of these items is made.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Sunken Empire
programme.desc: The secrets of the world's oldest sunken city are lost to history, but hi-tech underwater archaeology answers questions that books cannot. Experts explore sunken ruins and reveal new discoveries about one of the first great empires.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Sunken Empire
programme.desc: The secrets of the world's oldest sunken city are lost to history, but hi-tech underwater archaeology answers questions that books cannot. Experts explore sunken ruins and reveal new discoveries about one of the first great empires.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of King Arthur
programme.desc: Satellites spot a 2,000-year-old structure in Wales, that some suspect has a secret connection to King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail
programme.desc: At the tomb of one 3,000-year-old Egyptian pharaoh, experts report that the massive statues that guard the site can sing; using cutting-edge technology, investigators hunt for an explanation for this mysterious phenomenon.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Believe in Forgiveness
programme.desc: Teri Knight spent weeks driving cross-country, desperately searching for the secret her ex-husband, Manuel Gehring, took to his grave. It took years before a stranger finally solved the mystery that haunted Teri ever since learning Manuel died in prison.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Didn't Know It Was Blood
programme.desc: As Christina Hildreth unwittingly helped Shawn Grate clean up his first crime scene, she didn't realize what she was doing. Once police were banging on her door while she was trapped with a madman, she understood the situation was direr than she realized.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: When Debra Davis's husband accused her of being cold and immature for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought something was wrong with her. She never suspected her husband's perversions were signs that there was something evil deep within him.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: American Monster: It Was All of Them
programme.desc: The Futos are a close-knit family of five who film their lives over many decades. But when four of them are found brutally murdered, the investigation into the slayings will uncover a terrible truth and a family secret that has laid buried for decades.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Follow the Footprints
programme.desc: When the lifeless body of a young girl is found on the shore of the feather river, police hope that following a trail of footsteps and discarded articles of clothing will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In Defiance of Evil
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a bike ride through Defiance Park. The investigation into her disappearance leads police to fear that a serial killer is on the loose in Tacoma.

programme.title: American Monster: It Was All of Them
programme.desc: The Futos are a close-knit family of five who film their lives over many decades. But when four of them are found brutally murdered, the investigation into the slayings will uncover a terrible truth and a family secret that has laid buried for decades.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Follow the Footprints
programme.desc: When the lifeless body of a young girl is found on the shore of the feather river, police hope that following a trail of footsteps and discarded articles of clothing will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Wind
programme.desc: A daughter's quest to see her birth mother's murder solved is complicated

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alice Swanson was always envious of the perfect life her childhood neighbor, William Jennings Choyce, and his family seemed to have. But after she married him, she slowly realized that nothing under the surface was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: When Debra Davis's husband accused her of being cold and immature for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought something was wrong with her. She never suspected her husband's perversions were signs that there was something evil deep within him.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Long Sought Truth
programme.desc: Decades of investigation reveal the long-sought truth behind the terrifying abduction and murder of a young mother of three.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Trail of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple mysteriously disappears, police must piece together a shocking trail of betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Taken from Her Bed
programme.desc: An 8-year-old girl disappears from her bedroom in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Standoff
programme.desc: An unhinged divorcee with a score to settle initiates an armed standoff from the cramped confines of his trailer park. Then a disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda's case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A teenage party at the edge of the city turns horrific after the discovery of a woman's corpse. Detectives easily surmise that she was strangled with her own shoelace, but figuring out her identity proves difficult.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation. But when Kenda takes a closer look at the victim's love life, he realizes someone's been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Death and Silence
programme.desc: The body of a young musician turns up in an alley. Police learn she's been spending time with an older man.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Brides and Murder
programme.desc: Two young brides-to-be are just beginning to plan their weddings when their dreams are tragically cut short. Find out if the desperate calls made to 911 reveal the truth about their shocking deaths.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Eyes on Her
programme.desc: Two young women are savagely murdered. One has gone fishing only to turn up beaten and drowned, and the other is a pregnant mother attacked while on the job delivering newspapers.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.
